items.raw_desc: Wifi hálózati kártya TP-Link Archer TXE73E AXE5400 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 6E Bluetooth:Before you unroll your network cable to get it across the house or apartment, try  mounting a WiFi PC card. The TP-Link card can save you a lot of time. The TP-Link Archer TXE73E AXE5400 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 6E Bluetooth WiFi card is compatible with the PCI Express connector. This compact network device has a detachable antenna, which is pretty handy if you want to use it for more than one device. Better yet,  this WiFi card includes practical features  such as MU-MIMO, Bluetooth, OFDMA and WPA3 security. Key Features of the TP-Link Archer TXE73E AXE5400 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 6E Bluetooth WiFi Network Card The network card gives your PC Internet connectivity via WiFi Comes with a detachable antenna Maximum transfer speed on the 2.4GHz band up to 574 Mb/s, reaching 2402 Mb/s on 5Ghz PC connection via PCI Express interface The TP-Link Archer TXE73E AXE5400 Tri-Band Wi-Fi 6E Bluetooth WiFi Network Card supports the WiFi 802,11ac, WiFi 802,11ax and 802,11ax (6GHz) protocols
